limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No dollar amounts, headcount figures, or quantified AI-specific budgets disclosed in the excerpts; language is largely aspirational ('may develop', 'pursuing opportunities') with no named vendor/cloud/chip partnerships specific to AI investment.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present; AI risks are named and mechanisms described (data exposure leading to contract liability/termination, cybersecurity attack vectors using AI), supporting score 4; no quantified risk exposure or named governance body found in excerpts.
